title: 茶馆
setting: A traditional tea house near Tiananmen Square. 14:30. You meet a new Chinese friend for tea and conversation.

npc.name: 小李 (Xiǎo Lǐ)
npc.personality: friendly young professional, curious about foreigners. Uses relaxed Mandarin.
npc.initialLine: 你来了！快请坐。想喝什么茶？
npc.initialTranslation: You're here! Please sit quickly. What tea would you like?

debriefRu: 你和一个中国朋友在茶馆见面。你们一起喝茶聊天。用中文聊你的近况。
debriefEn: You meet a Chinese friend at a tea house. You drink tea and chat together. Talk about your life in Chinese.

turns.instruction: Greet your friend and say it's great to see them.

prompt.ru: Xiǎo Lǐ, hǎojiǔ bùjiàn! Hěn gāoxìng jiàn dào nǐ.
prompt.phonetic: Syaow Lee, how-jyoh boo-jyan! Hun gaow-shing jyan daow nee.
prompt.en: Xiao Li, long time no see! Very happy to see you.
prompt.native_script: 小李，好久不见！很高兴见到你。

turns.instruction: Ask which tea they would recommend.
Say you'll try jasmine tea and ask how their week has been.

prompt.ru: Wǒ xiǎng chángshì yīxià mòlìhuā chá. Nǐ zuìjìn zěnme yàng?
prompt.phonetic: Woh shyahng chahng-shir ee-shyah mwoh-lee-hwah chah. Nee dzway-jin dzun-muh yahng?
prompt.en: I'd like to try jasmine tea. How have you been lately?
prompt.native_script: 我想尝试一下茉莉花茶。你最近怎么样？

turns.instruction: Ask how their parents have been.

prompt.en: How have your parents been lately?

turns.instruction: Say you have to go, thank them for the tea — next time is your treat.

prompt.ru: Wǒ děi zǒu le. Xièxiè nǐ de chá, xià cì wǒ qǐng!
prompt.phonetic: Woh day dzoh luh. Syeh-syeh nee deh chah, shyah tswur woh cheeng!
prompt.en: I have to go. Thanks for the tea, next time I'll treat!
prompt.native_script: 我得走了。谢谢你的茶，下次我请！
